title: Finite and nilpotent strongly verbally closed groups
author_string: Klyachko, Anton A., Miroshnichenko, Veronika Yu., Olshanskii, Alexander Yu.
journal: Journal of Algebra and Its Applications
publisher: World Scientific Pub Co Pte Ltd
abstract: We show, in particular, that, if a finite group [Formula: see text] is a retract of any finite group containing [Formula: see text] as a verbally closed subgroup, then the centre of [Formula: see text] is a direct factor of [Formula: see text].
